TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Sapalmisasapal, title = Sapalmisasapal, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sapalmisasapal} }

S.FORM: sapal Maripa' no mako ko sapal no panay.
S.PHON: sapaɾ maripaʡ no~u mako~u ko~u sapaɾ no~u panaj.
S.FORM: sapal Maripa' no mako ko sapal no panay.
S.PHON: sapaɾ maripaʡ no~u mako~u ko~u sapaɾ no~u panaj.
